zh.roleLine: 全栈程序猿，摄影爱好者。捣鼓 AI Agent 和自动化工具。

paragraphs: 全栈程序猿，主要捣鼓 Next.js、Python、AI Agent 和自动化。GitHub 上搞了个 notebooklm-cn（NotebookLM 中文版克隆），还折腾 Hermes Agent 的各种自动化工作流。
readme.afterTechParagraph: 最近在探索如何用 AI 辅助摄影后期处理工作流。

cards.title: Hermes Agent

hero.headline: 写代码的，也拍照。
hero.subheadline: 全栈程序猿 · AI Agent 玩家 · 摄影爱好者

paragraphs: 全栈程序猿，主要用 Next.js、Python，最近沉迷 AI Agent 和自动化工作流。GitHub 上搞了 notebooklm-cn（NotebookLM 中文版克隆），日常用 Hermes Agent 管理各种自动化任务。
摄影爱好者，喜欢扫街和风光。最近在试 AI 辅助后期处理——毕竟程序猿的本能就是把一切能自动化的都自动化。

now.title: 最近在忙什么
paragraphs: 技术方面：继续折腾 Hermes Agent 的自动化工作流，写各种 skills，探索 AI 编程的边界。刚完成了 NotebookLM 中文版的网站克隆和部署。
摄影方面：研究 AI 辅助 RAW 后期处理流程，探索计算摄影——把代码思维应用到图像处理上。

setup.title: 开发环境
paragraphs: WSL + Neovim + Hermes Agent 的 AI 编程流。Obsidian 管理知识库（PARA + Zettelkasten）。
摄影后期用 Lightroom + AI 辅助插件。

en.roleLine: Full-stack developer, photography enthusiast. Building AI agents and automation tools.

paragraphs: Full-stack developer working with Next.js, Python, AI agents, and automation. Built notebooklm-cn (NotebookLM Chinese clone) on GitHub, and working on various automation workflows with Hermes Agent.
readme.afterTechParagraph: Currently exploring AI-assisted photography post-processing workflows.

hero.headline: I write code, and I take photos.
hero.subheadline: Full-stack Developer · AI Agent Builder · Photography Enthusiast

paragraphs: Full-stack developer, mainly working with Next.js and Python, recently deep into AI agents and automation workflows. Built notebooklm-cn (NotebookLM Chinese clone) on GitHub, and use Hermes Agent for daily automation tasks.
Photography enthusiast who loves street and landscape shooting. Currently experimenting with AI-assisted post-processing — after all, a developer's instinct is to automate everything.

now.title: What I'm up to
paragraphs: Tech: Continuing to build Hermes Agent automation workflows, writing skills, and pushing the boundaries of AI-assisted coding. Just completed the NotebookLM Chinese clone website and deployment.
Photography: Exploring AI-assisted RAW post-processing workflows and computational photography — applying a coder's mindset to image processing.

setup.title: Dev Environment
paragraphs: WSL + Neovim + Hermes Agent for AI-assisted coding. Obsidian for knowledge management (PARA + Zettelkasten).
Photography post-processing with Lightroom + AI-assisted plugins.
